place: Chaweng Noi, Maret, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Mediterranean-Moorish Sea-View Pool Villa Enclave - Chaweng Noi
blurb: A Mediterranean–Moorish enclave carried to a Koh Samui hillside above the sea — whitewashed walls, terracotta arches and cobalt zellige set among cypress, fountains and lantern-lit courtyards on the south-east coast at Chaweng Noi. Five residence types, from lagoon-front one-bedrooms to three-bedroom sea-view pool villas, all fully furnished, turnkey and under professional rental management. From ฿6,970,000, with a projected ~11-14% return.
detail:
Where Marrakech meets the Gulf of Siam — an intimate, low-density enclave that brings the soul of North Africa to the south-east coast of Koh Samui at Chaweng Noi, just a 5-minute walk to Chaweng Noi beach. Whitewashed walls and the cool of shade, terracotta arches and cobalt zellige, cypress, fountains and the flicker of lanterns at dusk: a place designed to feel timeless rather than fashionable, with architecture that belongs to the hillside it is built on. A full 5-star resort with complete amenities, completing Q4 2028.

The estate unfolds across three connected settings, all sharing the same Mediterranean–Moorish design language. The Laguna, at the water's edge, where a winding lagoon-pool threads through the lower estate to private terraces with direct lagoon frontage. The Hillside, where single-storey pool villas step up the slope to garden, lagoon and common-pool views. And the Hilltop — the quietest, highest ground, where pool villas turn toward the open sea for uninterrupted sunset and Gulf of Siam views.

Five residence types span the three collections, each delivered fully furnished and turnkey (pre-sale pricing, valid until July 31st 2026 only — a 15% discount to post-launch pricing for early investors, unlocking a higher ROI):

• 1-bedroom lagoon-front (55 m² + terrace) — from ฿6,970,000
• 2-bedroom lagoon-front (91 m² + terrace) — from ฿7,905,000
• 1-bedroom hillside pool villa (78 m² + terrace) — from ฿9,010,000
• 2-bedroom hilltop sea-view pool villa (83 m² + terrace) — from ฿11,900,000
• 3-bedroom hilltop sea-view pool villa (110 m² + terrace) — from ฿13,515,000

Beautiful — and built to work. Every residence is placed under professional rental management for genuinely hands-off ownership, with projected ROI of around 11–14% depending on unit type and position; on the developer's operating model the signature two-bedroom villa targets around 14% net yield at roughly 76% occupancy. For owners who prefer full predictability, there's also the option to opt into a guaranteed 8% ROI program — hand the villa fully over to management and earn fixed passive income, no active involvement required. Either way, dual value as both a personal Samui home and a yield-generating asset.

Currently in Phase III; guide prices vary by plot, position, level and view, and are confirmed at reservation.
